languages.text: "Послушайте. Палить по сумасшедшим — занятие жалкое, но если надо — выстрелю, не побрезгую". {n}Сержант внушительно лязгает тяжелым автоматом на плече.{/n} "Рассказывайте свои бредни где-нибудь еще".

traits.locale_text: "Послушайте. Палить по сумасшедшим — занятие жалкое, но если надо — выстрелю, не побрезгую". {n}Сержант внушительно лязгает тяжелым автоматом на плече.{/n} "Рассказывайте свои бредни где-нибудь еще".

languages.text: "Listen well: shooting madmen is a wretched business, but if I have to do it, I will." {n}The sergeant makes a point of adjusting the heavy weapon on his shoulder, which clanks menacingly.{/n} "Spew your gibberish somewhere else."
languages.original_text: "Послушайте. Палить по сумасшедшим — занятие жалкое, но если надо — выстрелю, не побрезгую". {n}Сержант внушительно лязгает тяжелым автоматом на плече.{/n} "Рассказывайте свои бредни где-нибудь еще".

traits.locale_text: "Listen well: shooting madmen is a wretched business, but if I have to do it, I will." {n}The sergeant makes a point of adjusting the heavy weapon on his shoulder, which clanks menacingly.{/n} "Spew your gibberish somewhere else."

"Listen well: shooting madmen is a wretched business, but if I have to do it, I will." {n}The sergeant makes a point of adjusting the heavy weapon on his shoulder, which clanks menacingly.{/n} "Spew your gibberish somewhere else."

"Listen well: shooting madmen is a wretched business, but if I have to do it, I will." {n}The sergeant makes a point of adjusting the heavy weapon on his shoulder, which clanks menacingly.{/n} "Spew your gibberish somewhere else."

languages.text: “听好了，对付疯子确实很麻烦，但真要动手，我也不会手软。”{n}军士刻意调整了一下肩上那挺重型武器，发出威胁性的金属声。{/n}“要发疯到别处发去。”
languages.original_text: "Listen well: shooting madmen is a wretched business, but if I have to do it, I will." {n}The sergeant makes a point of adjusting the heavy weapon on his shoulder, which clanks menacingly.{/n} "Spew your gibberish somewhere else."

traits.locale_text: “听好了，对付疯子确实很麻烦，但真要动手，我也不会手软。”{n}军士刻意调整了一下肩上那挺重型武器，发出威胁性的金属声。{/n}“要发疯到别处发去。”

languages.text: « Écoutez-moi bien : je ne prends aucun plaisir à abattre les désaxés, mais je n'hésiterai pas à le faire si vous m'y obligez, » {n}déclare le sergent en ajustant ostensiblement l'arme lourde sur son épaule dans un claquement métallique qui sonne comme une menace.{/n} « Allez importuner quelqu'un d'autre avec vos divagations. »
languages.original_text: "Listen well: shooting madmen is a wretched business, but if I have to do it, I will." {n}The sergeant makes a point of adjusting the heavy weapon on his shoulder, which clanks menacingly.{/n} "Spew your gibberish somewhere else."

traits.locale_text: « Écoutez-moi bien : je ne prends aucun plaisir à abattre les désaxés, mais je n'hésiterai pas à le faire si vous m'y obligez, » {n}déclare le sergent en ajustant ostensiblement l'arme lourde sur son épaule dans un claquement métallique qui sonne comme une menace.{/n} « Allez importuner quelqu'un d'autre avec vos divagations. »

languages.text: "İyi dinleyin: Delileri vurmak tatsız bir iştir ama gerektiği takdirde vurmaktan çekinmem." {n}Çavuş, omzundaki ağır silahı tehditkâr bir şekilde şangırdatarak düzeltiyor.{/n} "Zırvalarınızı başka yerde kusun."
languages.original_text: "Listen well: shooting madmen is a wretched business, but if I have to do it, I will." {n}The sergeant makes a point of adjusting the heavy weapon on his shoulder, which clanks menacingly.{/n} "Spew your gibberish somewhere else."

traits.locale_text: "İyi dinleyin: Delileri vurmak tatsız bir iştir ama gerektiği takdirde vurmaktan çekinmem." {n}Çavuş, omzundaki ağır silahı tehditkâr bir şekilde şangırdatarak düzeltiyor.{/n} "Zırvalarınızı başka yerde kusun."

languages.text: «Escúcheme: disparar a los locos es un asunto desagradable, pero lo haré si es necesario». {n}El sargento ajusta ostentosamente el arma de su hombro, que emite un estruendo amenazador.{/n} «Suelte esas tonterías en otra parte».
languages.original_text: "Listen well: shooting madmen is a wretched business, but if I have to do it, I will." {n}The sergeant makes a point of adjusting the heavy weapon on his shoulder, which clanks menacingly.{/n} "Spew your gibberish somewhere else."

traits.locale_text: «Escúcheme: disparar a los locos es un asunto desagradable, pero lo haré si es necesario». {n}El sargento ajusta ostentosamente el arma de su hombro, que emite un estruendo amenazador.{/n} «Suelte esas tonterías en otra parte».

languages.text: "Hört mir genau zu: {mf|Einen Verrückten|Eine Verrückte} zu erschießen, ist erbärmlich, aber ich werde es tun, wenn ich muss." {n}Der Sergeant rückt mit einem bedrohlichen Klappern die schwere Waffe zurecht, die über seiner Schulter hängt.{/n} "Erzählt Euren Unsinn woanders."
languages.original_text: "Listen well: shooting madmen is a wretched business, but if I have to do it, I will." {n}The sergeant makes a point of adjusting the heavy weapon on his shoulder, which clanks menacingly.{/n} "Spew your gibberish somewhere else."

traits.locale_text: "Hört mir genau zu: {mf|Einen Verrückten|Eine Verrückte} zu erschießen, ist erbärmlich, aber ich werde es tun, wenn ich muss." {n}Der Sergeant rückt mit einem bedrohlichen Klappern die schwere Waffe zurecht, die über seiner Schulter hängt.{/n} "Erzählt Euren Unsinn woanders."

languages.text: 「よく聞いてくれ。狂った連中を撃つのは嫌な仕事だが、やらなければならなければやる。」{n}軍曹は肩に担ぐ重たい銃を調整し、威嚇するように金属音が鳴り響く。{/n}「お前のくだらない話はどこかで言え。」
languages.original_text: "Listen well: shooting madmen is a wretched business, but if I have to do it, I will." {n}The sergeant makes a point of adjusting the heavy weapon on his shoulder, which clanks menacingly.{/n} "Spew your gibberish somewhere else."

traits.locale_text: 「よく聞いてくれ。狂った連中を撃つのは嫌な仕事だが、やらなければならなければやる。」{n}軍曹は肩に担ぐ重たい銃を調整し、威嚇するように金属音が鳴り響く。{/n}「お前のくだらない話はどこかで言え。」
